name: Crisp Chinese Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boned pork butt or shoulder,
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-5 quart pan on high heat, combine the meat, garlic, anise seed, ground cinnamon, ground cloves, soy sauce, and 1 quart water.
2. Bring to a boil; cover and simmer until the meat is very tender when pierced, about 1 1/2 hours.
3. Boil, uncovered, on high heat until sizzling, about 30 minutes. Stir often.
4. Drain off fat.
5. With 2 forks, shred the meat; put into a 9x13-inch pan.
6. Bake in a 400°F oven until the pork begins to crisp, 15-20 minutes.
7. Spoon over rice; add onion, cilantro, and hoisin to taste.
Per serving: 313 calories; 20 grams protein; 12 grams fat; (4 grams saturated fat); 30 grams carbohydrates; 566 milligrams sodium; 66 milligrams cholesterol.
